overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a sunny rural village and onto a forest trail. The scene features bright midday lighting, colorful traditional architecture, and lush summer vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village square with scattered buildings

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the village square past a fallen body on the left

entered.detail: Two-story wooden house with blue painted walls and arched doorway
Red wooden building with white window frames and wooden stairs
Fallen figure lying face-down on the dirt ground with blood stains nearby
Cart with wooden barrels parked near the house
Simple wooden chair sitting outside the red building

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit rural village square with colorful wooden houses. A dead body lies on the dirt ground to the left as he passes by wooden carts and chairs scattered around the clearing, heading toward a path split ahead.

events.description: character turns right onto the uphill forest trail away from the village square

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns onto the uphill trail and continues walking into the denser vegetation

entered.detail: Stone staircase leading up the hillside adjacent to the dirt path
Thick green bushes and flowering plants lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: Turning onto an uphill dirt trail, the scene becomes more enclosed by dense green vegetation. The village buildings fall behind as Geralt ascends into the wooded area, with stone steps visible to the right and the blue house receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, sunlit village square into the enclosed greenery of a wooded trail. It begins with Geralt walking through a rural clearing past colorful wooden houses, moving across dirt ground scattered with wooden carts, chairs, and a fallen body. As he reaches a fork in the path, the camera follows him turning onto an uphill dirt trail, causing the village buildings to recede into the background. The scene then shifts from the open architecture of the square to a more intimate environment as dense green vegetation closes in around the path. Finally, the camera ascends further into the wooded area, passing stone steps to the right as the village disappears entirely behind the lush foliage.
